cs.heroTitle: AI responds to clients in 30 seconds — while managers sleep
cs.heroSubtitle: We connect an AI assistant to Telegram, Instagram and WhatsApp. Qualifies leads, filters spam, passes hot clients to the manager.
cs.featuresTitle: What the AI assistant can do
cs.f1Desc: Telegram, Instagram Direct, WhatsApp. One assistant — all channels. The client writes wherever is convenient.
cs.f2Desc: Asks the right questions and labels them: Cold — not ready, Warm — interested, Hot — ready to buy. The manager only gets hot ones.
cs.f3Desc: Detects bots, unusual requests and fraud patterns. Protects against fake traffic and spam.
cs.f4Title: Transfers the conversation to the manager at the right moment
cs.f4Desc: When a client is hot — instant notification to the manager with full conversation context. No need to read from the beginning.
cs.fw2: Services — medicine, education, real estate, lawyers
cs.fw3: Managers cannot respond within an hour

ma.heroTitle: Business control in one window — for the owner
ma.heroSubtitle: Not just a chatbot. A management tool: team control, finances and tasks. Weekly reports directly in Telegram.
ma.warningText: Management Assistant works effectively only if the company already has processes — tasks are set, reports are submitted, data is entered. AI helps to monitor and analyze, but does not create discipline from scratch.
ma.f1Desc: Who does what, who misses deadlines, who has not submitted a report. Daily snapshot for each employee.
ma.f2Desc: Every Sunday — a report in Telegram: what was completed, what is overdue, what risks are ahead next week.
ma.f3Desc: Monitor cash flow. Notification if expenses exceed the budget or the plan is not met.
ma.f4Desc: AI detects anomalies — sharp revenue drops, rising costs, unusual patterns. Alerts before it becomes critical.

ca.heroTitle: Your own AI knowledge base — answers only from your documents
ca.heroSubtitle: Upload company documents — regulations, price lists, instructions. AI answers accurately from your data. Makes nothing up. Data stays internal.
ca.ragNote: Unlike regular ChatGPT — Corporate AI does not make up answers. If the information is not in your documents, it will say so.
ca.f1Desc: HR policies, regulations, product manuals. A new employee asks questions — AI responds like an experienced colleague.
ca.f2Desc: Price lists, specifications, deal terms. The manager asks — AI finds what's needed in seconds.
ca.f3Desc: AI works with up-to-date data from your systems in real time.
ca.f4Desc: We deploy the server on your hardware or in your cloud. No requests go to OpenAI or any external services.
ca.pricingSubtitle: Choose a package for your organization's scale
ca.plan1F1: RAG on PDF and Word documents
ca.plan2F2: Integration with Bitrix24 / amoCRM / Google Drive

case1.challenge: Low lead conversion from Instagram Direct — 15% of leads were lost due to slow manager responses. Average response time 2-4 hours.
case1.solution: Deployed AI manager for Instagram, integrated with AmoCRM, trained on 500 typical dialogs, set up auto-escalation for complex queries.

case2.challenge: Support team of 5 couldn't handle request volume. Average response time — 6 hours. 30% lead loss.
case2.solution: Deployed AI manager for Telegram and WhatsApp, integrated with HubSpot CRM, automated lead qualification and FAQ.

items.question: How much does AI manager implementation cost?
items.answer: From $1,500/month for the basic plan to custom Enterprise solutions. Cost depends on message volume, number of messengers, and customization level.

items.question: What are the implementation timelines?
items.answer: From 2 weeks for basic setup to 6-8 weeks for full customization with CRM integrations and training on your data.

items.question: Does our team need technical expertise?
items.answer: No, we handle all technical tasks. Your team only provides data, FAQ, and feedback for model training.

items.question: Which messengers are supported?
items.answer: Telegram, WhatsApp Business, Instagram Direct. We can add other platforms on request: Facebook Messenger, Viber, and others.

items.question: How is data security ensured?
items.answer: All data is encrypted with AES-256, stored on secure servers. GDPR, SOC 2 compliance available. On-premise deployment possible.

items.question: Can we change plans later?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade anytime. When upgrading — proportional recalculation.

items.question: What support is provided?
items.answer: Email support on all plans, 24/7 chat on Advanced and Enterprise, dedicated account manager on Enterprise.

items.question: Is there a trial period?
items.answer: Yes, 14 days free on the Advanced plan for testing. No credit card required, full functionality.
